name: v2 Stripe checkout missing customerâ†”account binding check
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 Â· L11-02] handleCheckoutCompletedV2 omits the legacy getSubscriptionByStripeCustomerId binding-mismatch refusal; a tampered metadata.accountId can activate a paid tier on the wrong account with no detection. Fix: add the binding check + captureException before activation.
acceptanceCriteria:
Root cause (at time of capture): handleCheckoutCompletedV2 in apps/api/src/services/billing/billing-v2/stripe-webhook-handler-v2.ts lacked the customer-account binding check present in the v1 handler (stripe-webhook-handler.ts:686-728 via getSubscriptionByStripeCustomerId), allowing a tampered metadata.accountId to activate a paid tier on the wrong account with no detection or Sentry escalation.

Current state: FIX ALREADY SHIPPED in PR #1343 (commit b0b434072). The binding guard is present at stripe-webhook-handler-v2.ts:396-429: calls getSubscriptionByStripeCustomerIdV2, and if the bound subscription's accountId !== the metadata accountId, fires captureException with context 'stripe.webhook.v2.checkout.completed.account_binding_mismatch' and returns without activation. Four break tests in apps/api/src/services/billing/billing-v2/stripe-webhook-handler-v2.test.ts (lines 78-247) cover: (a) refuses + escalates when customer is bound to a different account; (b) activates when customer bound to same account; (c) activates first purchase (no prior binding); (d) skips check when session.customer is null.

Variants: all four covered by existing tests â€” different-account tamper (blocked), same-account (passes), null customer (skip guard), first purchase (no prior binding). These are the exhaustive variant set.

Executor verification task: run the binding-guard suite (pnpm exec nx run api:test --testPathPattern=stripe-webhook-handler-v2) and confirm lines 78-247 all pass. Mark the WI closed if they do.
riskImpact: Without the guard, a Stripe checkout webhook with a tampered metadata.accountId would activate a paid subscription on the wrong account â€” account-takeover via billing. Fix is confirmed shipped (PR #1343). IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED is off in prod.
